headline: Worried about Strait of Hormuz inflation to come? The world economy has one word for you: Plastics
summary: Worried about consumer inflation to come from Strait of Hormuz closure? The economy has one word for you other than oil: plastics.

headline: The Condo Market Is Showing Signs of Recovery. What Potential Buyers Should Know.
summary: People buy condos to avoid shoveling snow and all the other hassles of homeownership.  Rich Brooks and his wife bought a two-bedroom, two-bath condo in 2020 in Punta Gorda, Fla., for $225,000.  During the pandemic, condo values in Florida soared.
